name: Proto-Tai-Kadai (family node)
notes: STRUCTURAL ANCESTRY NODE (not a modelled G2P target). Proto-Tai-Kadai (Kra-Dai) is the reconstructed ancestor of the Tai-Kadai family, including the Southwestern Tai varieties Thai and Lao. It exists here only so the ancestry / phylogenetic-distance metrics of the modern varieties that reference it have a node to resolve to; NO phonology is claimed or reconstructed and the minimal grapheme set is a placeholder (afa.json / trk.json stub pattern).

sources.author: Pittayaporn, P.
sources.title: The Phonology of Proto-Tai
sources.notes: Reference for Tai reconstruction (structural node only).
